steps.title: Identify the cost structure
steps.content: The company charges \$880 flat rate for the first 3 hours, then \$60 per hour for each additional hour. Total rental time is $t$ hours (where $t \gt 3$), and total cost is \$1,120.

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content:
The hours beyond the first 3 is $(t - 3)$, costing \$60 per hour. Total cost equals the flat rate plus additional hours' cost:
$$ 880 + 60(t - 3) = 1,120 $$
That confirms C is correct.
